steps.title: Find the line from the table
steps.content: Use the table points directly. From $(0,22)$ to $(1,23)$, the slope is $m=\frac{23-22}{1-0}=1.$ Since $y=22$ when $x=0$, the intercept is $22$.

steps.title: Check the model against the table
steps.content: The equation is $y=x+22$. It gives $y=22$ when $x=0$, $y=23$ when $x=1$, and $y=24$ when $x=2$, so it matches all three rows.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• A) $y=x+22$ — slope $1$, intercept $22$. Matches all three points.
  • B) $y=24x$ — at $x=0$ gives $y=0$, not $22$. Eliminated.
  • C) $y=24x+2$ — at $x=0$ gives $y=2$, not $22$. Eliminated.
  • D) $y=22x$ — at $x=0$ gives $y=0$, not $22$. Eliminated.
A is correct.
